news.headline: LeddarTech to transfer from Nasdaq Global to Nasdaq Capital Market on Feb 6, 2025. No impact expected on trading.
news.summary: Quebec City, Canada - On February 5, 2025, LeddarTech® Holdings Inc., a notable automotive software company specializing in patented disruptive AI-based low-level sensor fusion and perception software technology, known as LeddarVision™, confirmed receiving approval from the Nasdaq Stock Market to shift its securities listing from the Nasdaq Global Market to the Nasdaq Capital Market. The Company’s Common Shares and publicly traded warrants will retain the symbols “LDTC” and “LDTCW”, respectively. The transition to the Nasdaq Capital Market is poised to occur without any disruption to trading in the Company’s securities and is scheduled to be effective starting February 6, 2025, at the opening of trading.

South Korea's December current account surplus widens to $12.368 billion.
South Korea's goods trade surplus widens to $10.434B in December
Skyworks Solutions Inc reports Q1 revenue $1.068B, EPS $1.60, CEO transition; shares decline after hours.
news.summary: After reporting quarterly financial results and announcing a CEO transition, Skyworks Solutions Inc (NASDAQ:SWKS) saw its shares decrease in after-hours trading. The company revealed Q1 revenue of $1.068 billion, slightly higher than the estimated $1.066 billion. Additionally, Q1 Adjusted EPS was reported at $1.60, surpassing expectations of $1.57. President and CEO Liam Griffin expressed satisfaction with the 4% sequential revenue growth and stated that demand indicators in Broad Markets have shown improvement. The company also highlighted successful support for new product launches in Mobile and achieved impressive free cash flow with margins exceeding 30%.

news.headline: Cisco acquired SnapAttack, a Booz Allen spinout cyber company, in 2021. $BAH announced the completion.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, Booz Allen (NYSE: BAH) disclosed that Cisco has finalized its acquisition of SnapAttack, a cybersecurity firm previously spun out of Booz Allen in 2021.

news.headline: Dorman Products, Inc. will report Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 26, 2025 after Nasdaq market hours.
news.summary: Dorman Products, Inc. (NASDAQ: DORM) based in COLMAR, Pa., is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The announcement is scheduled for after the Nasdaq Stock Market's closing on February 26, 2025.

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics' Q4 EPS misses estimates, with a loss of 32 cents per share versus 28 cents expected. Net loss was $35.4 million.
news.summary: Viking Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VKTX) released its Q4 financial results, showing a quarterly loss of 32 cents per share, falling short of the expected 28 cents loss. This marks an increase from the 25 cents loss per share reported in the same period the prior year. The company's net loss for the quarter was $35.4 million, compared to $24.6 million during the same period in 2023. Research and development expenses for the year ended December... (for the full story, refer to Benzinga.com).

news.headline: Asian markets set to increase as Wall Street continues to climb, Markets Wrap reports.
Arm, an AI chip stock, fails to meet expectations post big rally; disappointing outlook ahead.
Healthpeak Properties announces offering of $500.0 million in 5.375% senior unsecured notes due 2035. #Healthcare #Investment
news.summary: Denver-based Healthpeak Properties, Inc. disclosed that its operating company, Healthpeak OP, LLC, has successfully priced a public offering of $500.0 million in 5.375% senior unsecured notes due in 2035. The notes, which represent the operating company's senior unsecured obligations, will be issued fully and unconditionally. Healthpeak, listed on the NYSE as DOC, is a prominent real estate owner, operator, and developer catering to the healthcare sector.

news.headline: DXC Technology's stock receives a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. via @IBDinvestors
news.summary: DXC Technology has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating its improving technical performance. This news raises the question of whether this positive trend will persist. This upgrade has caught the attention of investors and analysts, prompting speculation about the future trajectory of DXC Technology's stock.

news.headline: Gold Field ADR gains IBD rating upgrade due to improving technical performance.  📈
news.summary: Gold Field ADR has seen a surge in Relative Strength Rating, indicating improved technical performance. Investors wonder if this momentum will persist. The stock recently received an upgrade in its IBD Rating, sparking interest among investors.

news.headline: MicroStrategy rebrands, experiences significant losses, halts Bitcoin purchases after a 12-week spree.
news.summary: A software company known as MicroStrategy recently underwent a rebranding effort but encountered financial challenges as their losses increased beyond expectations. During the 12-week period leading up to their latest results, the company heavily invested in bitcoin. Despite this buying spree, the company reported significant losses, causing a pause in their bitcoin acquisition strategy. This news comes in the aftermath of the rebranding effort by MicroStrategy, reflecting a turbulent period for the business. The company's struggles were highlighted by its widening losses, showcasing the difficult financial situation it currently faces. The pause in the bitcoin buying spree was likely a strategic decision to reassess the company's financial strategy moving forward.

news.headline: GSK's stock rose by 8% post reporting mixed Q4 results, driven by a bullish long-term sales outlook exceeding $50 billion by 2031.
news.summary: GSK released a somewhat varied fourth-quarter report recently, however, the company's stock saw a significant increase due to its optimistic long-term projections exceeding $50 billion in sales. The rise in GSK stock was notable, with an 8% surge following the announcement of the revised 2031 outlook surpassing $50 billion.

news.headline: Meta stock has a 13-day winning streak, its longest ever, while other big tech peers are slumping.
news.summary: For 13 days in a row, Meta stock has achieved a higher closing value, marking its longest winning streak in history. While Meta's performance has been impressive, some major tech companies have experienced a decline in their stock value during the same period.

news.headline: Arm Holdings beats estimates in Q3, gives in-line outlook causing stock to fall. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Arm Holdings exceeded expectations for the chip designer's fiscal third quarter results but provided guidance that was in line with expectations. Despite the positive performance, Arm stock declined following the announcement. This news indicates that Arm Holdings reported strong numbers for the quarter, but investors reacted negatively to the company's outlook. The stock fell in response to the news.

news.headline: XOi acquires Specifx with investment from KKR, enhancing field service technology. Major milestone achieved.
news.summary: XOi, a prominent provider of technology solutions for the field service sector, has recently acquired Specifx, a platform specializing in data enrichment and metadata retrieval for field service equipment. This acquisition was made possible through an investment by funds managed by notable global investment firm KKR. This funding from KKR represents a major milestone in XOi's efforts to enhance its system of work for the field service industry.

news.headline: Rockwell Automation sets quarterly dividend at $1.31 per share on common stock, payable March 10 to shareholders of record on Feb. 18.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.31 per share on its outstanding common stock. This dividend will be payable on March 10, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 18, 2025. Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is a leading global company in industrial automation and digital transformation, bridging human imagination with advanced technological capabilities.

news.headline: Zeta Global moves up release of Q4 and full year 2024 financial results to Feb 25, 2025.
news.summary: Zeta Global has moved up the release date of its fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 financial results to February 25, 2025, from the previously scheduled date.

news.headline: Sangoma Technologies reports Q2 Fiscal 2025 results, $X in operating cash flow, targeting cloud-based communication solutions.
news.summary: Sangoma Technologies Corporation, a leading provider of cloud-based Communications as a Service solutions, revealed its financial results for the second quarter. The company, listed on both TSX (STC) and Nasdaq (SANG), reported unaudited condensed consolidated interim financial statements for the three and six month periods concluding on December 31, 2024. In this quarter, Sangoma demonstrated robust operating cash flow.

news.headline: Global biologics drug substance manufacturing market to grow at a CAGR of ~11% by 2032 due to rising chronic diseases, driving need for biologics development.
news.summary: The market for manufacturing biologics drug substances is experiencing significant growth, primarily driven by the increasing incidence of chronic diseases. This has led to a higher demand for the development and production of biologics. The market expansion is also fueled by advancements in manufacturing technologies.

news.headline: Black Stone Minerals, L.P. declares $0.375 cash distribution per common unit for Q4 2024; schedules earnings call.
news.summary: Black Stone Minerals, L.P. (NYSE: BSM) based in Houston has declared a cash distribution of $0.375 per common unit for the fourth quarter of 2024. The partnership announced the earnings call for the fourth quarter and full-year 2024. The Board of Directors of the general partner approved the distribution.

news.headline: Eldorado Gold shares Skouries project update, 2025 production and cost guidance, growth plan, and conference call info.
Portillo’s Inc. will release Q4 2024 results on Feb. 25, 2025. Symbol: PTLO. Headquarters in Oak Brook, IL.
news.summary: Oak Brook, Illinois-based Portillo’s Inc. (Nasdaq: PTLO) will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 25, 2025. The popular fast-casual restaurant chain, famous for its Chicago-style menu, will make the announcement before the market opens on that day. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating the figures to be disclosed, which will provide insights into the company’s performance during that period. This news signifies a crucial update for those following Portillo’s financial trajectory in the market.

news.headline: Ambarella to host Q4 & FY 2025 earnings call on Feb. 26, 2025, at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time (NASDAQ: AMBA).
news.summary: Ambarella, Inc., a leading edge AI semiconductor company, has disclosed that its third quarter fiscal year 2025 earnings conference call is scheduled for February 26, 2025, at 1:30 p.m. PT. Following that, the company will release its earnings report after the market closes on the same day. Ambarella, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMBA) invites stakeholders to mark their calendars for this important update on the company's performance.

news.headline: NASA astronaut Nick Hague connects with NJ students from Thomas Edison EnergySmart Charter School, answering STEM questions remotely.
news.summary: A group of students from the Thomas Edison EnergySmart Charter School in Somerset, New Jersey, are set to engage in a unique opportunity on Feb. 5, 2025. They will be connecting with NASA astronaut Nick Hague, who will be responding to pre-recorded questions focused on science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM). Hague will be aboard a spacecraft during this interactive session, enabling the students to gain insights directly from his experiences in space.

news.headline: MG Properties buys Park 12 Apartments in San Diego for $309M, boasting 35 stories and 43,000 sq.ft. of retail space.
news.summary: A prominent real estate investment and management firm, MG Properties, has recently finalized the purchase of Park 12 Apartments in downtown San Diego. The property, a 35-story high-rise residence, boasts 43,000 square feet of retail space. MG Properties invested $309 million in this acquisition.

news.headline: FormFactor stock drops after missing Q4 earnings and weak guidance. Q4 revenue: $189.48M, EPS: 27 cents vs. estimates of 29 cents. High Bandwidth Memory grew 4x in fiscal 2024.
news.summary: FormFactor Inc (NASDAQ:FORM) stocks are plunging in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results, which fell short of analyst projections. The company reported a Q4 revenue of $189.48 million, while estimates were at $191.12 million. Their Q4 Adjusted EPS stands at 27 cents, missing the expected 29 cents. Despite this, total revenue increased by 12.7% year-over-year. FormFactor noted a significant growth in High Bandwidth Memory, which saw a fourfold increase in fiscal 2024 due to the rise in generative AI adoption. Additionally, DRAM probe-card revenue continued to rise in the quarter, reaching record levels for the third consecutive quarter. The company anticipated the decline in fourth-quarter revenue, gross margin, and non-GAAP earnings per share.

news.headline: Blizzard raises $2M+ for CureDuchenne through WoW charity, funding Duchenne MD research globally.
news.summary: In response to the documentary "The Remarkable Life of Ibelin," gamers globally are joining forces to pay tribute to Mats Steen and raise funds for revolutionary research and essential treatment. Based in Newport Beach, California, on Feb. 5, 2025, CureDuchenne, the prominent non-profit organization focused on discovering a cure for Duchenne, is at the forefront of these efforts.

news.headline: Recursion shares Phase 2 data for REC-994 in CCM at conference; 12-month data from SYCAMORE study shows successful trial.
news.summary: On February 5, 2025, in Salt Lake City, Recursion (Nasdaq: RXRX) disclosed findings from a 12-month evaluation of the Phase 2 trial (SYCAMORE) involving REC-994, marking the initial industry-led Phase 2 investigation finalized in Cerebral Cavernous Malformations (CCM). In September 2024, the company revealed that the investigative study aimed at identifying signals had successfully achieved its primary objective.

Weis Markets (WMK) declares quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share to shareholders of record on Feb. 18, payable Mar. 4, 2025.
news.summary: Sunbury, PA - Today, Weis Markets, Inc. (NYSE: WMK) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share for its shareholders. Those on record as of February 18, 2025, will receive the payment on March 4, 2025. Established in 1912, Weis Markets, Inc. is a respected company in the industry.

news.headline: CFA and AgVend partner to offer digital financing solution for ag retailers and customers, enhancing their longstanding partnership.
news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri, on February 5, 2025, the Cooperative Finance Association, Inc. (CFA) and AgVend announced further collaboration to introduce a cutting-edge digital financing solution. This enhancement of their partnership aims to provide a seamless digital financing option through AgVend's platforms. The partnership between CFA and AgVend brings innovation to agricultural financing, benefiting farmers and agribusinesses.

news.headline: BMI presents digital land record solutions at 2025 Geomatics Conference in CSU Fresno, connecting with industry professionals.
news.summary: BMI team unveiled their advanced digital tools for historic land records at the 2025 CSU Fresno Geomatics Conference, engaging with industry experts aiming to enhance land surveying techniques. Located in SUNNYVALE, Calif., the team participated in the event on Feb. 5, 2025.

MicroStrategy, a Bitcoin giant, rebrands to 'Strategy' amid a loss last quarter due to buying spree. Rebrand buzz in crypto world.
news.summary: Last quarter, Strategy reported a loss as its significant Bitcoin purchases increased. However, the focus on Wednesday was largely on the rebrand announcement which generated significant interest and talk among individuals.

news.headline: Arm Holdings beat expectations, but fell late; ARM stock and AI chip stocks surged, Tesla dropped.
news.summary: Arm Holdings performed better than expected but experienced a late decline, following a rise in ARM stock, Nvidia, and other AI chip stocks on Wednesday. Dow Jones Futures reported ARM falling late despite the rally of AI chip stocks like Nvidia. Additionally, Tesla recorded a decline in its stock value.

'Great American Rescue Bowl' hosted by Beth Stern features more heartfelt rescue stories, with animalleague.org and partners hosting shelter adoption parties nationwide to remember pets displaced by natural disasters. New York, Feb. 5, 2025.
news.summary: Supporting shelter adoptions, AnimalLeague.org and collaborators nationwide are organizing adoption events this weekend. The aim is to assist all animals and pets affected by recent natural disasters. People are encouraged to participate in rescue efforts and show their support. The events are taking place in different locations across the country.

Symbotic Inc. (NASDAQ:SYM) stock plummets after Q1 report: quarterly losses of three cents per share, revenue $486.69 million.
news.summary: Symbotic Inc. (NASDAQ: SYM) released its first-quarter financial results after the market closed on Wednesday. The report showed a quarterly loss of three cents per share, falling short of the expected two-cent loss as per analyst consensus. Additionally, the quarterly revenue stood at $486.69 million, missing the projected $490.98 million. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

AGF reported $54.4 billion in assets under management and fee-earning assets as of January 31, 2025.
news.summary: As of January 31, 2025, AGF Management Limited announced its total assets under management (AUM) and fee-earning assets stood at $54.4 billion.

news.headline: Arm's cautious forecast raises worries about AI's growth, with implications for tech industry.
DIAGNOS closes $2.01M private placement, issuing 6,715,370 units at $0.30 each for early health issue detection AI tech.
news.summary: In BROSSARD, Quebec, on Feb. 05, 2025, DIAGNOS Inc. (TSX Venture: ADK) (OTCQB: DGNOF), a leader in early detection of health issues using Artificial Intelligence (AI), has concluded a non-brokered private placement. The placement involved 6,715,370 units, each priced at $0.30, resulting in total proceeds of $2,014,611.

news.headline: Associated Capital Group, Inc. reported year-end AUM of $1.25 billion, book value of $42.14 per share, and returned $58.6 million to shareholders in 2024. It also completed $42 million in charitable contributions since 2015.
news.summary: Associated Capital Group, Inc. reported its financial results for the full year-ended December 31, 2024. They ended the year with an AUM of $1.25 billion and cash and investments of $40.78 per share. They sold 1.15 million shares of GAMCO for proceeds of $30.4 million, returned $58.6 million to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases, and completed shareholder-designated charitable contributions totaling $42 million since their 2015 spin-off. Book value per share was $42.14 at year-end 2024, with $2.20 per share of dividends paid. They reported net income of $44.3 million for the year, with a net income per share of $2.08. AUM fluctuated due to outflows and currency fluctuations, with net outflows of $363 million and $49 million in market appreciation. The alternative investment management strategy focuses on merger arbitrage, with a historical positive net return record.

news.headline: NextWave Integrated Solutions launches in Alexandria, focusing on improving small businesses and GovCon projects.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on February 5, 2025, NextWave Integrated Solutions (NextWave) was officially launched. The boutique consulting firm focuses on enhancing small businesses and optimizing GovCon project delivery solutions. NextWave offers a wide range of professional services to support these objectives.
